productDisplayName: Spice Art Women Glass Silver Evening Clutch
description: Look your glamorous best with this spice art clutch, customised for the ethnic diva in you. Show off your ethno-western side with this piece, which is as functional as it is fashionable. Width: 28 cm Height: 12.5 cm Synthetic upper with a wave pattern, pleated in the centre and has embellishments along the borders Has a clasp button closure One zippered pocket and a pouch on the inside Care Wipe surface with a dry clean cloth
